title: Modern Indian-Themed Restaurant Website for Indian Garden Chicago

requirements.text: Create a visually rich homepage with a full-screen hero section featuring the restaurant name 'Indian Garden', a tagline, and a call-to-action button ('View Menu' / 'Reserve a Table'). The hero should use warm Indian-inspired colors (saffron, turmeric gold, deep crimson, ivory) and decorative motifs (paisley, mandala patterns) rendered via CSS or SVG. Include a sticky navigation bar with links to Menu, About, and Contact sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is full-viewport height with the restaurant name and tagline prominently displayed
Sticky navigation bar is present and links scroll smoothly to respective sections
Color palette uses saffron, gold, deep crimson, and ivory tones consistently
Decorative Indian motifs (mandala/paisley) appear in the hero and section dividers

requirements.text: Build a Menu section showcasing food categories (e.g., Appetizers, Breads, Vegetarian Entrees, Non-Vegetarian Entrees, Biryanis, Desserts, Drinks) sourced from the original site at http://www.indiangardenchicago.com/. Each menu item card should display the dish name, description, and price. Cards should use a warm card design with subtle gold borders and Indian-inspired typography.

quotes: Menu showcase page displaying food items with Indian-inspired design

acceptanceCriteria: Menu is organized into clearly labeled food categories
Each menu item shows name, description, and price
Menu items are displayed as styled cards with gold accent borders
Category tabs or section headings allow easy navigation between food types

requirements.text: Create a backend actor in Motoko to store and serve restaurant data including: menu items (name, description, price, category), restaurant info (address, phone, hours), and a list of specialties or featured dishes. Expose query functions for retrieving this data.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor exposes a query to retrieve all menu items grouped by category
Backend actor exposes a query to retrieve restaurant contact and hours info
Backend actor exposes a query to retrieve featured/specialty dishes
All data is pre-seeded with realistic Indian Garden Chicago content

requirements.text: Build an About / Story section describing Indian Garden Chicago's history and culinary philosophy. Include a warm narrative about authentic Indian cuisine, the restaurant's founding story, and its Chicago presence. Style with an elegant side-by-side layout using a decorative image placeholder and text.
acceptanceCriteria: About section contains a narrative about the restaurant's story and cuisine philosophy
Section uses a two-column layout (image + text) on desktop, stacks vertically on mobile
Design is consistent with the overall Indian art and color theme

requirements.text: Build a Contact & Info section displaying: restaurant address (68 W. Washington, Chicago, IL), phone number, operating hours for each day of the week, and an embedded Google Maps iframe for the location. Style with a warm Indian-themed card layout and decorative dividers.
acceptanceCriteria: Address, phone number, and hours are clearly displayed
Operating hours are shown per day in a readable format
Google Maps embed shows the restaurant location
Section styling matches the overall site theme

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive Indian art-inspired visual theme site-wide. Use a warm color palette of saffron (#FF9933), turmeric gold (#D4A017), deep crimson (#8B0000), and ivory (#FFFAF0) as primary colors. Typography should use an elegant serif font for headings (e.g., Playfair Display) and a clean sans-serif for body text. Include decorative section dividers using mandala or floral SVG patterns, and subtle texture overlays to evoke Indian textile aesthetics.

quotes: Overall Indian art and color theme applied site-wide
warm modern design inspired by Indian art and colors

acceptanceCriteria: Saffron, gold, crimson, and ivory color palette is used consistently across all sections
Playfair Display (or equivalent elegant serif) is applied to all headings
Decorative SVG section dividers with Indian motifs appear between major sections
Site is fully responsive and looks polished on mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Create a footer with the restaurant logo text, quick navigation links, social media placeholder icons, address, and a copyright line. Style with a deep crimson or dark saffron background with ivory text.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer includes restaurant name, quick nav links, address, and copyright
Footer background uses a deep, rich color contrasting with ivory text
Footer is present on all pages/sections

requirements.text: Generate the following static image assets for use in the website and place them in frontend/public/assets/generated: a decorative mandala hero background, a food spread banner, and a restaurant ambiance illustration.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses the mandala background image
About or featured section uses the food spread banner
Images are responsive and load correctly from frontend/public/assets/generated

constraints: All restaurant content (menu items, hours, address) must be based on the original Indian Garden Chicago website at http://www.indiangardenchicago.com/
Do not use blue or purple in the color palette
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: CMS or admin panel for content management

required: Ornate golden mandala pattern on a deep saffron-to-crimson gradient background, suitable for a full-screen hero section (hero-mandala-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Vibrant overhead flat-lay of colorful Indian dishes — curries, naan, biryani, and chutneys arranged on a dark wooden surface with marigold flowers as garnish (food-spread-banner.dim_1400x600.png)
Warm-toned illustration of an elegant Indian restaurant interior with ornate lanterns, rich tapestry walls, and candlelit tables (restaurant-ambiance.dim_1200x800.png)
Circular Indian Garden restaurant logo badge with paisley border in gold and saffron on ivory background (restaurant-logo.dim_300x300.png)
